nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-faced crombec
nodes.summary: The red-faced crombec (Sylvietta whytii) is a species of African warbler, formerly placed in the family Sylviidae. It is found in Burundi, Ethiopia, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Namibia, Rwanda, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests, subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References External links Red-faced crombec - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
